testcase.name: run_onlyValidateFlag_returnsExitCode2
testcase.system-err:
Usage: java [-Dkey=value ...] -jar app.jar [--dry-run] <job-slug> [key=value ...]
Slug convention: invoice-job → spring/jobs/invoice-job.xml + bean: invoiceJob customer-etl → spring/jobs/customer-etl.xml + bean: customerEtl
Job parameters (appended after slug): java -jar app.jar invoice-job batchDate=2026-01-15 retryMax=3 Available in XML via #{jobParameters['batchDate']} Also override any ${key} from application.properties
Dry-run / validate mode (loads context + validates, no job executed): java -jar app.jar --dry-run invoice-job batchDate=2026-01-15 java -jar app.jar --validate invoice-job Exit 0 = PASSED, 2 = FAILED (context error or param validation failure)
Config flags (-D before -jar): -Dapp.profile=prod loads classpath:application-prod.properties -Dapp.config.file=/path/f.props loads an external override file
Backward-compat (explicit XML path): java -jar app.jar spring/jobs/invoice-job.xml invoiceJob batchDate=2026-01-15

Usage: java [-Dkey=value ...] -jar app.jar [--dry-run] <job-slug> [key=value ...]
Slug convention: invoice-job → spring/jobs/invoice-job.xml + bean: invoiceJob customer-etl → spring/jobs/customer-etl.xml + bean: customerEtl
Job parameters (appended after slug): java -jar app.jar invoice-job batchDate=2026-01-15 retryMax=3 Available in XML via #{jobParameters['batchDate']} Also override any ${key} from application.properties
Dry-run / validate mode (loads context + validates, no job executed): java -jar app.jar --dry-run invoice-job batchDate=2026-01-15 java -jar app.jar --validate invoice-job Exit 0 = PASSED, 2 = FAILED (context error or param validation failure)
Config flags (-D before -jar): -Dapp.profile=prod loads classpath:application-prod.properties -Dapp.config.file=/path/f.props loads an external override file
Backward-compat (explicit XML path): java -jar app.jar spring/jobs/invoice-job.xml invoiceJob batchDate=2026-01-15
